-rwxr-xr-x 1 jose jose 792 Jun 17 18:33 /home/jose/bin/bridge-route.sh
---
#!/bin/bash
# bridge-route.sh: route a command to a target VM
# Usage: bridge-route.sh <vm-name> <base64-encoded-command>
VM="$1"
CMD_B64="$2"

VM_IPS=(
  ["vm-claude-hub"]="127.0.0.1"
  ["vm-ecosystem"]="192.168.0.203"
  ["vm-memory"]="192.168.0.205"
  ["vm-openclaw"]="192.168.0.199"
  ["vm-hermes"]="192.168.0.202"
  ["vm-mcp-services"]="192.168.0.204"
  ["vm-dashboard"]="192.168.0.206"
  ["vm-journal"]="192.168.0.207"
  ["vm-identity"]="192.168.0.208"
  ["vm-relationship"]="192.168.0.209"
)

IP="${VM_IPS[$VM]}"
if [ -z "$IP" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Unknown VM: $VM" >&2
  exit 1
fi

if [ "$VM" = "vm-claude-hub" ]; then
  echo "$CMD_B64" | base64 -d | bash 2>&1
else
  echo "$CMD_B64" | base64 -d | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@"$IP" bash 2>&1
fi
---
vm-claude-hub
---
